ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_login" TEXT /* Login name of the user */,
  "oauth_application_id" INTEGER /* OAuth application ID associated with the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, contributor) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "user_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role FOREIGN KEY ("user_role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., CC-BY, CC-BY-NC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the license allows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the taxon */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "iconic_taxon_name" TEXT /* Iconic taxonomic group name */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., species, genus, family) */,
  "parent_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxon in the taxonomic hierarchy */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  "habitat_preferences" TEXT /* Preferred habitats of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographic location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation */,
  "positional_accuracy" REAL /* Positional accuracy of the coordinates */,
  "geoprivacy" TEXT /* Geoprivacy level of the observation */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the observation was made */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the observation was made */,
  "city_town" TEXT /* City or town where the observation was made */,
  "geographic_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positioning_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the positioning method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positioning_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the positioning device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identification_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the agreement */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation related to the agreement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the agreement */,
  "agreement" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user agrees with the identification */,
  "agreement_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the agreement */,
  "agreement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agreement was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identification_agreements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identification_disagreements" (
  "disagreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the disagreement */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation related to the disagreement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the disagreement */,
  "disagreement" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user disagrees with the identification */,
  "disagreement_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disagreement */,
  "disagreement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disagreement was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disagreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identification_disagreements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_grades" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality grade */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, researcher, contributor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the image */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_sounds" (
  "sound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sound file */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation associated with the sound file */,
  "sound_url" TEXT /* URL of the sound file */,
  "sound_description" TEXT /* Description of the sound file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sound file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tag */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)
